phrases.intent_en: Ask a local for the best bakery in the neighbourhood
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me conseiller la meilleure boulangerie du quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo meh kon-say-YAY lah may-YUHR boo-lan-ZHREE doo kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Vieux-Nice has several excellent boulangeries — look for fougasse, the local olive and herb flatbread.

responses.english: Yes, the Boulangerie du Cours is excellent, right here.
responses.phonetic: BON-zhoor poor-YAY voo muh kon-say-YAY la may-YUR boo-lahn-zhuh-REE dyoo kar-TYAY
responses.local: Oui, la Boulangerie du Cours est excellente, juste ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the neighbourhood is safe to walk at night
phrases.text_local: Le quartier est-il sûr pour se promener le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh kar-TYAY eh-TEEL SOOR poor seh pro-meh-NAY leh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Vieux-Nice is lively and generally safe at night, especially around Cours Saleya which becomes a bar and café strip.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the colourful street name signs mean
phrases.text_local: Que signifient ces plaques de rue bilingues en niçois et en français ?
phrases.pronunciation: keh seen-YEE-fyan say PLAK deh ROO bee-LAN-gweh an nee-SWAH ay an fran-SAY
phrases.cultural_note: Street signs in Vieux-Nice appear in both French and Niçard — the local Occitan language, closely related to Italian.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for an evening apéritif bar
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous une adresse à me recommander pour prendre l'apéritif ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY voo oon ah-DRES ah meh reh-ko-man-DAY poor PRAN-dreh lah-pay-ree-TEEF seh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: The streets around Rue de la Préfecture come alive at aperitivo hour — a tradition with strong Italian roots in Nice.

responses.english: The Bar du Cours is perfect, two streets from here.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR oh-RYAY voo uun ah-DRES ah muh ruh-kaw-mawnd POOR prawn-DR lah-pay-ree-TEEF suh SWAHR
responses.local: Le Bar du Cours est parfait, à deux rues d'ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get back to Place Masséna from here
phrases.text_local: Comment regagner la Place Masséna depuis ce quartier, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN reh-gah-NYAY lah PLAS mah-SAY-nah deh-PWEE seh kar-TYAY seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Place Masséna is a 5-minute walk west from Vieux-Nice along the Promenade du Paillon.

responses.english: Go straight towards the promenade, then left.
responses.phonetic: kaw-MAHN a-LAY a la PLAHS ma-say-NAH duh-PWEE ee-SEE, seel voo PLEH
responses.local: Allez tout droit vers la promenade, puis gauche.
